name: James Mitchell
title: Senior Strength Coach
bio: With over 12 years of experience coaching everyone from weekend warriors to professional athletes, James brings a no-nonsense approach to strength development. He holds a Master's in Exercise Science and is a certified CSCS through the NSCA. His programmes have produced state and national-level powerlifting champions.

name: Sarah Chen
title: Physiotherapist & Rehab Specialist
bio: Sarah is a licensed physiotherapist with a special focus on sports injuries and post-surgical rehabilitation. After working with professional sports teams for 5 years, she joined VitalEdge to bring elite-level recovery care to everyday athletes. Her approach combines manual therapy with targeted exercise prescription for lasting results.

name: Marcus Williams
title: HIIT & Conditioning Coach
bio: Marcus is a high-energy conditioning coach who believes fitness should be fun and challenging in equal measure. A former collegiate track athlete, he brings competitive intensity to every session while keeping workouts accessible to all fitness levels. His HIIT programmes are known for delivering visible results in as little as 4 weeks.

name: Elena Rodriguez
title: Yoga & Mobility Instructor
bio: Elena is a 500-hour certified yoga instructor (RYT-500) who blends traditional yoga philosophy with modern mobility science. After spending 3 years studying in India, she returned with a deep understanding of alignment, breathwork, and the mind-body connection. Her classes are equally popular with athletes looking to improve recovery and professionals seeking stress relief.

name: David Okonkwo
title: Registered Dietitian
bio: David is a registered dietitian who cuts through nutrition fads with science-backed advice. Specialising in sports nutrition and body composition changes, he has helped hundreds of clients transform their relationship with food. His approach is flexible and sustainable—no restrictive diets, just smart strategies that fit your lifestyle.

name: Lisa Thompson
title: Personal Training Lead
bio: Lisa leads our personal training team and has built a reputation for transforming bodies and building confidence. Specialising in body recomposition and women's fitness, she understands that the best programme is one you can stick to. Her clients love her encouraging yet challenging style that pushes you just beyond your comfort zone.

name: Alex Kim
title: Sports Massage Therapist
bio: Alex is a certified sports massage therapist who works with athletes and active individuals to keep their bodies in peak condition. His deep tissue work and myofascial release techniques are particularly effective for chronic tension patterns. Whether you're dealing with a nagging injury or just need maintenance work, Alex has the hands to sort it out.

name: Rachel Nguyen
title: Mental Wellness Coach
bio: Rachel combines sports psychology with mindfulness coaching to help clients build mental resilience. With a background in clinical psychology and experience working with Olympic-level athletes, she brings a unique perspective to performance anxiety, burnout prevention, and focus enhancement. Her sessions are practical, evidence-based, and genuinely life-changing.

name: Michael Brown
title: Pilates Instructor & Movement Specialist
bio: Michael is a fully certified Pilates instructor (Comprehensive Reformer & Mat) who has been transforming bodies through controlled, precise movement for over 10 years. His background in dance gives him a unique understanding of biomechanics and body awareness. Clients love his patient, detail-oriented approach that delivers real results without the high-impact stress.

name: Nina Patel
title: Rehabilitation Specialist
bio: Nina is a specialist in post-injury and post-surgical rehabilitation, working closely with orthopaedic surgeons and physiotherapists to design recovery programmes that are both safe and effective. Her background in biomechanics and sports science means she understands not just how to rehab an injury, but how to prevent it from happening again. Her return-to-sport protocols are used by professional athletes across multiple disciplines.
